dashboard.monitoringSubtitle: Live financial KPIs, pending recharge queue, wallet ledger tail, and operational counts — refreshed every 60 seconds.
dashboard.metricsUtcHintFallback: Approved recharges whose updatedAt falls on the current UTC calendar day.
dashboard.bonusDistributedHint: Sum of bonusAmount for approved recharge requests today (UTC).
dashboard.agentLiquidityHint: Sum of wallet balances for users with AGENT role.
dashboard.pendingRechargeHint: Recharge requests in PENDING state need immediate review.
dashboard.noFinancialPermission: You do not have the VIEW_FINANCIALS permission. Financial KPIs, ledger, and exports are hidden.
dashboard.bonusGiftedLifetimeSub: From approved recharge requests (bonusAmount) — wider scope than “today’s bonus”.
dashboard.activeAgentsSub: AGENT accounts in ACTIVE status on the platform.
dashboard.liveLedgerSub: Last 10 movements from WalletLedger — refreshes with metrics every 60 seconds or when you click refresh.
dashboard.exportLedgerSub: Choose the date range for export
dashboard.dateRangeInvalid: Start date must be on or before end date.
dashboard.exportFooterHint: Without dates in the URL, the server exports the last 30 days by default. CSV opens well in Excel.
